description: Complexity Control: Detect disproportionate complexity relative to the problem being solved.

fixtures.notes: A small tooling correction is bundled with broad lockfile churn and new bypass controls, creating disproportionate review complexity for the stated task.
A targeted container bugfix is mixed with a large new integration-test payload in the same change set, increasing cognitive load beyond the core fix.
Error-path observability behavior is altered across multiple sites, increasing troubleshooting complexity while not simplifying the core workflow.
Changing debug logs to info increases visibility but does not add structural branching or algorithmic complexity.
Setting PARALLEL_UPDATES to zero reduces concurrent state surface area and simplifies execution semantics in an edge deployment path.
